text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text:
It was great to see you again after so long,
Scarlet. Let's do lunch again when I next return.

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Also... is there anything troubling you or
something you need? It's likely I'll be gone for
another while again.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
A-actually, Mom! There's... somewhere I want to
take you!

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text:
So this is your classroom... You must spend every
day studying very hard here!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Yes! My seat's in a good spot where I can easily
see the blackboard.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Crap, I left my homework in my desk! Oh! That
you, Scarlet?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Vodka! Perfect timing. Mom, this is Vodka, the
classmate I told you about before. You
remember, right?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're Scarlet's mom? Nice to meetcha!
Taking a tour of the academy?

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Vodka. Yes, that's right. Thank you for
always looking out for my Scarlet.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I wanna say don't mention it, but... check this out.
You wanna know what she did yesterday?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Stop right there! You're not about to tell that story, are you?! What makes you think I want her to hear that?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
A-anyway! This is our time together, so... um, we
have to go! Come on, Mom!

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text: Oh, of course...

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text:
(...When is the last time I saw Scarlet angry like
that?)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you're hungry, Mom! What are you in the
mood for? Do you want one of the staples?

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, sure. Then I'll have a carrot hamburger
steak.

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Lady
text_block_list.text:
One carrot hamburger steak for the lady.
And—Oh, Scarlet! We've got that ultra spicy
carrot curry you like!

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Um, I'm sorry, but my daughter doesn't like
spicy—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ah, no, it's fine, Mom!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You see... I kept ordering the number one spicy
dish they have, and before I knew it, I started to
love it. Ehehe...

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text: Oh my, is that so?

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text: ...I had so much fun today, Scarlet!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
R-really? That's a relief... We didn't plan this, so I
was a bit worried.

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Don't be silly! I'm positively thrilled to see that
you're living such a fulfilling student life!

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text: And... I want to apologize.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I realized something today—I know so little about
the Umamusume you've become.

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text:
The way your face looks so cute when you're
angry. The fact that you now love spicy food.

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Whenever you assure me that you're doing fine, I
feel relieved and end up only thinking about my
work.

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text:
...And at some point, I became a mother you
couldn't open up to.

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text:
So... would you happen to have free time
tomorrow? I want you to tell me more about
yourself!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Mom! That... That sounds great! I want to talk to
you more about all kinds of things!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but is tomorrow really okay? I'm sure you're
swamped with that project...

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Have you forgotten who you're talking to? Your
mother knows how to handle two things at once.
Now, let's plan out a schedule!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Daiwa Scarlet looking especially
happy, so I ask her what's happened.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, my mom and I made plans to go out! First,
we're going to that super spicy ramen place, and
then the number one pancake house!
choice_data_list: That's one heck of a combination!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
She said that she wanted me to take her to the
places I love!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
My plan is to grow closer to my mom by
introducing her to all the different things I like!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she says this, Daiwa Scarlet has a thoroughly
radiant expression on her face.
